creator: david@phobia.ms
text:
When connecting to our host running Qpopper 3.1.2_1 installed
from ports, it connects, but hangs never showing the Qpopper prompt.  Qpopper 3.1.2
did not do this.  I am guessing it is caused by whatever changed when
moving to _1. 

NOTE: It _does not_ hang when connecting locally.

Fix: 

Not sure.
How-To-Repeat: Install the port and connect to it remotely.
